---
title: "cqrsProjection()"
description: "Derive a projection from declared CQRS event deps. Reducer failures become graph-visible error DATA facts on the returned `errors` node."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Derive a projection from declared CQRS event deps. Reducer failures become
graph-visible error DATA facts on the returned `errors` node.

## Import

```ts
import { cqrsProjection } from "@graphrefly/ts/cqrs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function cqrsProjection(
	graph: Graph,
	source: Pick<CqrsBundle<unknown, TEvent>, "events">,
	opts: CqrsProjectionOptions<TState, TEvent>,
): CqrsProjection<TState>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `source` | `Pick<CqrsBundle<unknown, TEvent>, "events">` | Source node that provides graph-visible input. |
| `opts` | `CqrsProjectionOptions<TState, TEvent>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `CqrsProjection<TState>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { cqrsProjection } from "@graphrefly/ts/cqrs";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/cqrs/index.ts`
